title: Learner State Schema
description: Schema for tracking learner state across simulated multi-turn algebra tutoring episodes in the learner-state-aware pedagogical RAG condition.

state_id.description: Unique identifier for this learner-state record.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the simulated tutoring session.

task_id.description: Benchmark task identifier, such as SE-01 or LE-04.

turn_number.description: Current turn number within the tutoring episode.

problem_id.description: Identifier for the current algebra problem. Usually matches task_id for benchmark evaluation.

topic.description: Algebra topic for the current task.

subskill.description: Specific algebra subskill targeted by the task.

recent_answer_attempt.description: Most recent learner answer, misconception statement, or follow-up message.

detected_error_type.description: Detected misconception or error type, such as incomplete_distribution or combining_unlike_terms.

hint_count.description: Number of hints already provided in the current tutoring episode.

interaction_summary.description: Compact rolling summary of the tutoring interaction so far.

last_pedagogical_mode.description: Most recent pedagogical response mode selected by the policy engine.

state_created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the state record was created.

state_updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the state record was last updated.
